description_long: This radiator features a series of evenly spaced, vertical blue metal columns mounted on a flat, rectangular white panel. The blue columns are tubular and run the full height of the radiator, providing a modern and efficient heat-dissipating design. At the bottom, there are visible pipe connections and a small valve assembly, suggesting its function as a water or steam-based heating unit. The side views reveal the radiator's slim profile and the protrusion of the blue columns from the white backing panel. The overall construction appears robust, with a hard, smooth finish typical of powder-coated steel or aluminum. The color contrast between the blue columns and the white panel gives it a contemporary, urban aesthetic suitable for public or residential spaces.
description: A modern radiator with vertical blue metal columns mounted on a white rectangular panel, featuring visible pipe connections at the bottom. The design is slim, robust, and visually striking with a smooth, hard finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of vertical blue columns and the white backing panel, with visible pipe connections at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the protrusion of the blue columns from the white panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain white panel with no visible columns or pipework.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the blue columns extending outward from the white backing.
attribute_pipe_connections: two pipe connections at the bottom, horizontally oriented
